title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain discusses his approach to building Glean, a $7 billion AI search startup, by focusing on solving a specific problem his team faced: finding information in enterprise data. He argues that success comes from focus and avoiding competition in well-served markets rather than building bigger models or better fundraising decks.
